name: Artemis II Session 6 Research Mappings
description: College department mappings for Session 6 research findings (2026-04-04)

topics.concept: Metadata-first tool registries — define capabilities as data before implementation
Tiered trust: built-in > plug-in > user-defined, with audit trails
Session persistence, workflow state separation, structured crash events
Pre-execution budget checking, hard limits per agent/convoy

mappings.rosetta: Agent Architecture → 12 harness primitives map to Gastown chipset

mappings.source: Kara Rawson — RL Framework for AI Agents in Game Systems

topics.concept: MDP/POMDP formalization for agent state-action-reward cycles
PPO, SAC, DQN, CQL — gradient-based policy optimization
ECS architecture for game engines — data-oriented design
Vulkan compute shaders, CUDA kernels for parallel RL training
ICM — prediction error as intrinsic reward drives exploration

mappings.rosetta: Reinforcement Learning → bridges mathematics (MDP) to mind-body (curiosity) through coding (ECS)

mappings.source: Marc Andreessen — Death of the Browser

topics.concept: Mainframe → PC → Internet → Mobile → AI. Each shift obsoletes the last UI paradigm.
Agent = LLM + bash + filesystem + markdown + cron. Simplicity over protocol complexity.
Neural nets (1943) → expert systems → transformers → agents. Compounding research payoff.
Technical capability outpaces organizational readiness. Velocity vs. operational discipline.

mappings.rosetta: Platform Shift → validates file-native agent architecture, challenges MCP complexity

mappings.source: p3nGu1nZz Channel — Game Engine Architecture (10 videos)

topics.concept: Order-independent accumulation — commutative operations make execution order irrelevant
SDD: maintain spec alongside code. 'TDD with a maintained spec.' Drift ≤ 1cm.
Declarative DAG with auto-barrier inference — system infers execution waves from declared I/O
Goal-conditioned sequence modeling — trajectory-aware decisions replace reactive policies
CUDA-Q on RTX 4060 Ti: 28-qubit simulation. QAE gives quadratic speedup on Monte Carlo.
Deferred rendering, Cook-Torrance BRDF, two-tier RT/rasterization fallback
Mechanics → Dynamics → Aesthetics: second-order design problem, feel emerges from rules
Free Energy Principle: prediction error as the single learning rule. Morphogenesis from local rules.

mappings.rosetta: Game Engine Architecture → unified thesis: declarative > imperative, determinism as foundation, emergence from simple rules

topics.concept: Reliability ≠ safety. System-level hazard analysis. Making components more reliable can make systems less safe.
Config-overwrite attack: file-write tool modifies approval config to bypass human-in-the-loop
Tool enumeration as primary artifact. Trust boundaries define the attack surface.

mappings.rosetta: Safety Engineering → harness integrity invariants, fail-safe defaults, defense in depth

topics.concept: Canonicalization + voting beats both pure graph and pure vector retrieval
RRF(k=60): fuse multiple retrieval lanes without learned weights
Embed entities alongside pages for semantic bridging across documents

mappings.rosetta: Information Retrieval → 3-lane search (vector + FTS + concept) validated

topics.concept: ATI V9800 → Tesla V100 → RTX PRO 6000: from render to ML to AI. $/TFLOP collapsed 100x.
5-tier white-box builds: budget, gaming, scientific, rack-optimized, cutting-edge
AI datacenter buildout consuming all DRAM fab capacity. RAM now 28-34% of build cost.
4004 (2,250 transistors) → modern (100B/mm²) = 533,333x in 47 years. 3D stacking next.

mappings.rosetta: Compute Economics → price/performance frontier tracking across 5 tiers, TOP500 ceiling reference
